sections.paragraph:
Original: דּבּה

Transliteration: dibbâh

Phonetic: dib-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. whispering, defamation, evil report
    1. whispering
    2. defamation, defaming
    3. evil report, unfavourable saying

Origin: from H1680 (in the sense of furtive motion)

TWOT entry: 396b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
